author: makortel
body:
#### PR description:

Backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50306
> In [#50302 (comment)](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/50302#issuecomment-3999594783) the `SiPixelDigitizerAlgorith::init()` was found to do something expensive, and being the main cause for the processing of first event to take ~17 minutes. This PR brings that processing time down to 15 seconds (the time spent in `SiPixelDigitizerAlgorith::init()` alone went from 1719 seconds to 1.29 seconds, as measured by VTune, so 1332x speedup).



#### PR validation:

None beyond https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50306

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50306
title: [15_1_X] Speed up SiPixelDigitizerAlgorithm::init()
